{{CargoClone
|name=Gugalanna
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=145
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=For Round 1, CRIT rate +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +2%
|}}
